item.title: Mycopunk - Official World Update Trailer
item.description: Mycopunk, the robotic shooter from Pigeons at Play, releases a fresh update with more weapons, objectives, and procedurally generated levels. Mycopunk is available in early access on PC via Steam.

item.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation Set Officially Approved by LEGO Ideas
item.description:
LEGO has officially confirmed a new set based on National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation through the LEGO Ideas forum. The LEGO set is expected to include a recreation of the Griswold house from the classic Christmas comedy.

The iconic line of brick building toys has featured crossovers with a wide variety of media properties. LEGO has collaborated with everything from popular comic book franchises like Spider-Man and Batman to movies like Shrek , with video games also being a popular source of collabs for the toy line. LEGO also welcomed the launch of one of its most highly requested crossovers in early 2026, debuting multiple official LEGO sets based on Pokemon 's most iconic creatures. Now, a beloved Christmas movie is getting a brand-new LEGO kit, thanks to the LEGO Ideas forum for fan projects.

LEGO Is Officially Making a National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation Set

The LEGO Ideas forum has reportedly approved a new set based on National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation , created by twrt0es. The set on the LEGO forums features a scale recreation of the Griswold home from the Christmas movie, complete with the snowy front yard and the RV parked in the driveway. The LEGO version of the Griswold residence includes a complete build for the inside of the house as well, showcasing each major room and many of its most memorable decorations. The creator of the post confirmed that LEGO has approved the National Lampoon set for development, meaning that the kit will be the newest LEGO Ideas project to be officially produced.

The National Lampoon set has already seen tons of suggestions from fans for the kit's final version. Some fans suggested adding twinkling or light-up elements to the set, though others preferred the lack of working lights as an homage to the National Lampoon franchise's Christmas movie. One LEGO enthusiast did point out that the final version of the set will likely differ from the fan-proposed design, potentially giving the house an open back for display purposes rather than the fully enclosed fan build.

The impressive Griswold house build is far from the first idea pushed into production through the LEGO Ideas forum. LEGO officially considers fan-made creations that reach 10,000 supporters on the forum for an official set, with the LEGO Review Board then determining whether the set will be officially produced. The LEGO Ideas forum has seen plenty of fan-made kits become official sets produced for the toy line, with some of the most notable including builds based on Pixar's Luxo Jr., Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory , and Twilight .

Click or tap on the games that match the category

Category: —
Time: 20s
Combo: 0 • x1.00

Round 1

The category for round 1 is …

5

Results

0
—
More Games

LEGO has a plethora of exciting kits on the way throughout 2026, beyond fan projects pushed through the Ideas forum. The toy line has 15 LEGO sets scheduled to release on May 1, including multiple FIFA sets featuring iconic players like Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi. Toy Story is also getting a trio of brand-new sets in May, including bookends of Slinky, a statue of Lotso, and an Alien riding the Pizza Planet Rocket Ride. National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation adds yet another iconic movie to LEGO's plethora of pop-culture crossovers.

item.title: Cronos The New Dawn - Official Mac Release Trailer
item.description: Cronos: The New Dawn, Bloober Team's dark 2025 survival horror game, has brought its terrifying action to Apple Mac devices. Cronos: The New Dawn is also available on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, Nintendo Switch 2 and PC.

item.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker - Official Collector's Edition Overview Trailer
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker shows off everyhting that comes in its Collector'sCoen Edition, including a Coen figurine, steel book, map, and more. The Blood of Dawnwalker launches on September 3, 2026, for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC via Steam.

item.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker - Official Story Trailer
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker shares the tragic backstory of Coen, a part-human, part-vampire hybrid, and the moral dilemmas he will face. The Blood of Dawnwalker launches on September 3, 2026, for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC via Steam.
